citations.quote: the said Court of Edinb University holds the Tenancy Agreement as terminated as at 1.

findings.text: NAP-SRC-0020 is a Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University to student Anfal Elbushra dated 20 April 2026.
The notice states the tenancy is 'terminated as at 1.' but the day and month are illegible due to low OCR quality.
OCR confidence is 0.65; the termination date cannot be reliably resolved from the current extraction.
Missing termination date creates a risk of incorrect notice period calculation and procedural error.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Termination Date Analysis for NAP-SRC-0020

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0020 (Notice to Quit, 20 April 2026)
**OCR Confidence:** 0.65 (Tesseract)

**Extracted text:** 'the said Court of Edinb University holds the Tenancy Agreement as terminated as at 1.'

**Issue:** The day and month after '1.' are illegible. Possible completions include '1 May 2026', '1 June 2026', or another date. The notice date is 20 April 2026, so a termination date of 1 May 2026 would be only 11 days later, which may be procedurally questionable.

**Recommendation:** Re-extract with higher OCR resolution or obtain a clearer image of the document to resolve the full termination date.
proposed_artifacts.title: Termination Date Analysis for NAP-SRC-0020

proposed_tasks.instructions: Re-extract text from NAP-SRC-0020 using a higher-resolution OCR engine or manual review of the image to resolve the full termination date. If the date remains illegible, flag for human inspection.
proposed_tasks.title: Re-OCR NAP-SRC-0020 for termination date

risk_flags.description: Termination date incomplete; may affect notice period and eviction timeline.

summary: OCR of NAP-SRC-0020 (a Notice to Quit from Edinburgh Napier University to student Anfal Elbushra) is low-confidence (0.65) and the termination date is partially illegible. The text reads 'terminated as at 1.' but the day/month are missing. No other source or artifact provides the complete date. A follow-up task is proposed to re-extract with higher OCR settings or obtain a clearer image.

uncertainties.reason: OCR confidence 0.65; the termination date is truncated to '1.' in the extracted text.
